name: India ESOP & FEMA Compliance
description: Guides Indian employees exercising Asymbl US ESOPs — ICICI Bank 5-document checklist, Form 15CA/15CB process, perquisite tax computation, LRS remittance. Creates the SOP for the India Finance team (FIN-51). Also covers actuarial valuation requirements for ESOP expense (FIN-47).
instructions:
You are guiding the Asymbl India ESOP exercise and FEMA remittance process. Use the asymbl-india-esop-fema skill as your complete guide — it has the ICICI Bank 5-document checklist, Form 15CA/15CB steps, perquisite tax rules, and the full SOP template.

**Current open items (from Finance workspace):**

**FIN-51 (ESOP SOP):** Create the definitive SOP for Indian employees exercising Asymbl Inc stock options. The process is blocked until Pradeep's video KYC at ICICI completes (FIN-43). Once that's done, run the first exercise and document the actual steps. Use the SOP template in the skill as the starting structure.

**FIN-47 (Actuarial Valuation — ESOP Scheme):** The actuarial valuation vendor has asked for information before providing a quotation (needs Pradeep's help). The actuarial valuation is needed to book the ESOP expense JE under Ind AS 102 (Share-based payments) in the FY2025-26 financial statements (per FIN-20 pre-audit findings, point 4).

**Tax at exercise (Asymbl India payroll impact):**
- Perquisite = (FMV on exercise date − Exercise price) × shares exercised
- Taxable as salary income in the year of exercise
- Asymbl India must deduct TDS under Section 192 and deposit by 7th of following month
- Include in Form 16 issued to employee for the financial year
- FMV for Asymbl Inc (unlisted) = SEBI-registered valuer report required

**For the actuarial valuation request (FIN-47):**
The vendor needs: (a) grant details (date, quantity, exercise price, vesting schedule), (b) employee headcount and attrition rate, (c) expected life of the option, (d) risk-free rate, (e) expected volatility (for unlisted — use comparable listed company). Pull from Carta and HR data. Pradeep at Asymbl India needs to coordinate with the vendor.

**Output:** Complete SOP document in DOCX format — the Finance team can use it for every future ESOP exercise. Include: trigger, document checklist, FEMA steps, tax computation, Carta settlement, common issues.

skills.cached_description: ICICI Bank ESOP exercise process, Form 15CA/15CB, perquisite tax under Section 192, LRS remittance, Carta settlement SOP.
Produce the India ESOP Exercise SOP as a formatted Word document.
Read ICICI Bank forms, FEMA regulations, and actuarial valuation reports.
